subject: Fw:
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, January 19, 2007 12:32:45 PM
Subject: FW:


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: James S. Meiskin [mailto:jmeiskin@plymouthpartners.com] 
Sent: Friday, January 19, 2007 11:57 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: 


Dear Jeffrey,
 
We are sending you the enclosed term sheet regarding the Radu private placement opportunity. We sought to provide you with attractive financial and control terms for your potential investment. We only included 1 other investor, Sheik Tarek Al-Fassi, who I have known for over 20 years and resides in Florida who has already forwarded $500,000 to us under the existing Radu private placement opportunity. There are other highly interested investors who we would not proceed with should you choose to invest in the Radu private placement opportunity. 
 
Radu, John D’Angelo, and I are very excited about the Radu Physical Culture business at the Plaza, in Southampton , and the branding and facility expansion opportunities. We are wrapping up the Plaza lease with Elad Properties and we would very much appreciate you letting me know if these terms, subject to proper documentation which we would promptly prepare, are acceptable to you in the relative near term.  Of course, please let me know if you have any questions.
 
Radu and I would be honored if you were the principle investor in elevating Radu’s fitness business to a very significant financial level. 
 
Best regards always,
 
James


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
